meaning: n.游击队,非正规军队adj.游击的
examples: They have very high respect for a criminal Jew, who led some kind of guerilla war and was executed long ago, somewhere in Syria.
The name Guerilla Girl also has a twist of irony.
Its leader was a lionized guerilla hero. The year was 1993.
Outraged by the injustice, he joins his older brother Teddy (Padriac Delaney) in the guerilla war.
Little did I know, but I was doing guerilla marketing in its purest form.
